meaning: adj.有事业心的,有进取心的,有魄力的,有胆量的,富有进取心
examples: What would this energetic, enterprising country be without new lands to conquer?
He is upright, optimistic, active and enterprising, striving for truthfulness, kindness and beauty, and seeking for an ideal society all his life.
To realize this vision, Ricci is mounting one of the most lavish, enterprising—and expensive—promotional campaigns in magazine-publishing history.
It is found in the compassionate hearts and the enterprising spirit of our citizens.
So I did what any enterprising (read: nosy) reporter would do: I reported around them.
